title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.006 - Immunity from liability granted, when, to whom
text:
375.006.  Immunity from liability granted, when, to whom. — There shall be no liability on the part of, and no cause of action of any nature shall arise against, the director of the department of commerce and insurance or against any insurer, its authorized representative, its agents, its employees, or any firm, person or corporation furnishing to the insurer information as to reasons for cancellation or nonrenewal, for any statement made by any of them in any written notice of cancellation or nonrenewal, or in any other communication, oral or written, specifying the reasons for cancellation or nonrenewal, or the providing of information pertaining thereto, or for statements made or evidence submitted at any hearings conducted in connection therewith.
(L. 1977 S.B. 300 § 6)
